node.text: James has visited Italy, Turkey, and Mexico besides his permanent residence and found Italy to be very beautiful with delicious food.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "countries visited travel") on Session 6 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James expressed an interest in traveling together with John to a new country next year and plans to start looking for options.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "countries visited travel") on Session 6 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James got the idea for the virtual world from a stranger he saw while walking his dogs and found inspiring.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "countries visited travel") on Session 6 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James bought air tickets to Toronto and plans to visit Vancouver as well.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "countries visited travel") on Session 16 (Score: 0.85)

node.text: James plans to return from his trip on July 20 and intends to bring back a souvenir for John.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "countries visited travel") on Session 16 (Score: 0.85)

node.text: James worked on a programming project combining gaming with programming, creating a virtual world inspired by Witcher 3 with a game character he designed.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "countries visited travel") on Session 6 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James is interested in extreme sports, recently trying rope jumping from a height of 150 meters and surfing.

node.text: James started a road trip with his family and dogs yesterday, enjoying exploring new places and nature.

node.text: James enjoys reading, especially during cold winter days, but finds it exciting to do something different in the summer.
